title: Section 3
content: On such date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, there shall be transferred to, and vest in, the Company, the undertakings of Reconstruction Bank.
footnote: 1. 27th March, 1997, vide notification No. S.O. 242(E), dated 25th March, 1997, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
